[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000 a
1 0000100 1
2 0000100 1
3 1000010 2
4 0000000 a
5 0000100 1
6 0000100 1
7 1000010 2

72 27 0000000 a match 0 4

37 73 0000100 1 match 1 2 5 6
